posts.text:
The Senate often considers complex, divisive issues. 

Protecting the votes of American citizens is not one of them. 

It is a simple task, and the American people are united:

Pass the SAVE America Act.

Video

Senate Cloakroom (@SenateCloakroom)

Agreed to, 51-48: Motion to proceed to the House Message to accompany S.1383, SAVE America Act.



— https://nitter.net/SenateCloakroom/status/2033996638579052633#m

Senator Grassley gets it, along with the vast majority of Americans in both parties.

Voters want the SAVE America Act!


Sen. Grassley Press (@GrassleyPress)

It's simple.

Voter ID is common sense, and the American people overwhelmingly support it. Sen. @ChuckGrassley outlines how the SAVE America Act would ensure election integrity. 🗳️

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/GrassleyPress/status/2033972255605018847#m

Let’s go. 🇺🇸


Breitbart News (@BreitbartNews)

Happening now: @LeaderJohnThune begins debate on the SAVE America Act.

"If there's anything essential to the integrity of elections, it's ensuring that those who are registered to vote are eligible to vote... It's just common sense."

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/BreitbartNews/status/2033915927926882663#m

We can beat Democrats, pass the SAVE America Act, and we don’t have to change a single Senate rule. 

All it takes is willpower.

Video

If Democrats want to sabotage secure elections, they’ll have to do so with the whole nation watching.

Video

If you’re fine with this, keep scrolling. 

If you think illegal voting should stop, join us and demand the SAVE AMERICA ACT.


New York Post (@nypost)

Illegal immigrants from Africa, India and China are voting in US elections - here's how they're doing it trib.al/iZsb0r3





— https://nitter.net/nypost/status/2033612823318680049#m

Absolutely right.


JD Vance (@JDVance)

The appropriate number of illegal immigrants voting in our elections is ZERO.

We can make that a reality if we pass the SAVE America Act into law today.

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/JDVance/status/2032544614696071391#m

True. 

We can make them talk.


The Federalist (@FDRLST)

Lyman: You Don’t Need To Nuke The Filibuster To Pass The SAVE America Act

thefederalist.com/videos/lym…




— https://nitter.net/FDRLST/status/2032205375617826905#m

Hold on, gonna try something real quick…


The Babylon Bee (@TheBabylonBee)

SAVE Act Passes After Mike Lee Cleverly Changes Its Name To The ‘Give Congress A Raise Act’ buff.ly/J5MFktl





— https://nitter.net/TheBabylonBee/status/2032155465010831524#m

Perfect timing from the White House!

Today I introduced legislation to allow these waivers for American businesses. 

It’s time to cut this 106-year-old red tape so Americans can support energy from our own ports instead of being forced to rely on Russian gas.


Fox News (@FoxNews)

BREAKING: White House considering temporary Jones Act waiver to keep shipments moving to U.S. ports, Leavitt tells Fox News





— https://nitter.net/FoxNews/status/2032119398274576567#m
